violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took slicer out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the bar fridge had an accumulation of broken glass. PIC removed glassware to clean fridge. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took slicer out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

Utensils (bar strainer) in the (bar area) are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
Inspector observed grease trap in the warewashing area missing the grease collecting receptacle. PIC informed inspector part has been ordered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink and sanitizer buckers were 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. PIC informed and will use dishwasher to sanitize. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (tasting spoons and dish) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC discarded spoons and clean and sanitized dish. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Potato al gratin and hard boiled eggs (shells removed), which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Lobster was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit in the cold drawer. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC had staff place cold packs on product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview, a pan of potato al gratin was placed hot in the walk-in cooler on 2/2. Potato al gratin was observed at 51 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC informed and discarded. Pasta was observed at 59 degrees, portioned in bags and in a deep container. PIC informed to place in shallow containers. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Working containers of liquid ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Utensils (silverware, tasting spoons, and bar strainer) in the kitchen and bar areas are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
The wine aerator (bar area) and ice bin (salad area) were not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
Automatic dispenser of sanitizer at 3 bay sink is not dispensing the proper concentration of quaternary ammonium. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the glassware dishwashers in the kitchen and bar areas. Inspector provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the warewashing area. Inspector provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -the mixer shield, slicer, hotel pans in back kitchen area -under service station -white trays in the storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
Inspector observed grease trap in the warewashing area missing the grease collecting receptacle. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

The following areas have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris: -under shelves in storage area -air curtains in the walk-in coolers, -under the grill lines. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
Inspector observed a non-functional light bulb in the cook line and meat walk-in cooler areas. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. Service was called during inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023

Cherry tomatoes were not washed before being cut. Raw fruits and vegetables must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are cut. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
Water observed on stacked food containers on clean storage rack. After cleaning and sanitizing, equipment and utensils must be air dried. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023

The slicer was not in good repair, with a hole through the blade and exposed screw heads on the front of the blade. PIC stated that is the design of the slicer. Slicer was taken out service and will not be used pending final instructions from Supervisor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
